title: elaphoglossum ellenbergianum
intro: Elaphoglossum ellenbergianum, also known as Ellenberg's elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum ellenbergianum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
